title: NEO 4.0 SUBSESSION_INDEX record format
_status: INSTALLED 4.0-P3-A (from the KEPT 4.0 Session-0 draft). Live spine schema. A-BRIDGE section 7 deferred 'SUBSESSION_INDEX record format' — now installed. The master's append-only ledger of every dispatched sub-session; carried by reference+hash in the HANDOFF_PACKET (A6/D7).

records.description: Append-only. One record per dispatched sub-session.

proof_ref.description: Reference to the last green ./NEO_SESSION/<slug>/proof/ artifact.

summary.description: Short human summary (A6: reference + hash + short summary, never bulky embed).

depends_on.description: P0.1/F3 (Codex): slugs this sub-session depends on. Lets the master identify dependents FROM THE INDEX ALONE, so the D8 'failed HIGH-risk blocks dependent continuation' rule is mechanically representable. Empty array = no dependencies.

dependent_continuation_blocked_until.description: P0.1/F3 (Codex): non-null marker set when this record's failure blocks dependents; carries the condition that clears it (e.g. 'resolution:rolled_back|human_accepted_fail of <slug>'). Cleared to null ONLY when status transitions to 'rolled_back' or 'human_accepted_fail'. While non-null, any record whose depends_on contains this slug MUST NOT continue (D8 §2).

rollback_ref.description: Reference into ./NEO_SESSION/<slug>/snapshots/ (the restore point). Required non-null when mode='rolled_back'.

gate_ref.description: HUMAN_GATE_LEDGER decision-log id. Required non-null when mode='human_accepted_fail' (D8 §2). Same gate_ref convention as the provenance envelope.

dependency_impact.description: Structured note on what dependent work this resolution unblocks or invalidates.

resolution.description: P0.1/F2 (Codex): machine-carried rollback/acceptance decision for a terminal (esp. failed HIGH-risk) sub-session. Null only for non-terminal statuses.

allOf._comment: P0.1/F2 FAIL-CLOSED: a human-accepted failure MUST carry a human gate_ref.
P0.1/F2 FAIL-CLOSED: a rolled_back record MUST carry the snapshot restore point.
